name: jarbou3i-research-engine
description: Jarbou3i Research Engine beta: state migration and version compatibility layer on top of provider browser QA, privacy export tests, portable account mock flow, provider identity/billing abstraction, evidence review queue, and source import adapters.

scripts.test: npm run test:qa && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:provider: node tests/provider-identity-check.mjs && node tests/portable-account-check.mjs && node tests/provider-response-check.mjs && node tests/provider-fixtures-check.mjs
scripts.test:source: node tests/source-planning-check.mjs && node tests/source-import-check.mjs && node tests/evidence-review-queue-check.mjs
scripts.test:v017: npm run test:v017:no-browser && npm run test:browser:provider
scripts.test:qa:core: node tests/qa-check.mjs && node tests/static-check.mjs && node tests/schema-check.mjs && node tests/fixtures-check.mjs && node tests/a11y-static-check.mjs && node tests/research-workflow-check.mjs
scripts.test:qa:provider: node tests/provider-identity-check.mjs && node tests/portable-account-check.mjs && node tests/privacy-export-guard-check.mjs && node tests/privacy-export-check.mjs && node tests/provider-response-check.mjs && node tests/provider-fixtures-check.mjs
scripts.test:qa:source: node tests/research-module-check.mjs && node tests/source-planning-check.mjs && node tests/source-import-check.mjs && node tests/evidence-review-queue-check.mjs
